title: Contributing to RxScript Design
text:
RxScript Design is the public, open-source design system for RxScriptor. Contributions welcome.



In scope: public tokens, components, docs, open-licensed assets.
Out of scope: anything GC Biopharma-specific (colors, logo, Freesentation font licensing) — those belong to the private GCBP Design (design-systems/gcbp/).





Open an issue describing the token/component and the problem it solves.
Submit a PR editing tokens/rxscript-tokens.css, docs/DESIGN-SYSTEM.md, or both.
Keep the --rx-* namespace. Do not introduce --gc-* variables.





CSS variables: --rx-<category>-<name> (e.g. --rx-primary, --rx-space-lg).
Component classes (future): .rx-<component>[__element][--modifier] BEM-ish.




By contributing you agree your contributions are licensed under the project’s LICENSE (TBD, likely MIT).

title: RxScript Design · v0.1 Skeleton
text:
Public, open-source design system for RxScriptor. This document is a structural scaffold — section headings mirror the private GCBP Design spec so the two systems can evolve in parallel. Fill each section as decisions are made.

TBD — see design-systems/gcbp/docs/DESIGN-SYSTEM.md for a reference implementation (private, GC Biopharma-specific).





0-1. Symbol Mark — TBD
0-2. Logo Proportions & Clear Space — TBD
0-3. Official Logo Colors — TBD
0-4. Incorrect Use — TBD




TBD




2-1. Primary Colors — placeholder in tokens/rxscript-tokens.css
2-2. Secondary Colors — TBD
2-3. Neutral Palette — placeholder
2-4. Semantic Colors (success / warning / danger / info) — placeholder
2-5. Gradients — TBD
2-6. Data Visualization Palette — TBD





3-1. Official Typeface — currently system-ui stack (TBD: choose open-licensed face)
3-2. Type Scale — TBD
3-3. Text Style Rules — TBD
3-4. @font-face declarations — N/A until a custom face is chosen




TBD




5-1. Grid — TBD
5-2. Spacing scale — defined in tokens
5-3. Border radius — defined in tokens
5-4. Layout archetypes — TBD




TBD

TBD
